content:
📜 Rules for XP Sacrifices
✔ A max of 1 XP trade per student per unit.
✔ Sacrifices must be public—students cannot trade XP in secret.
✔ Some trades must be approved by a third party (the professor or a designated “mediator”).

✅ Why This Works:
• Prevents XP hoarding while adding strategic depth.
• Encourages students to form alliances & class-wide engagement.
• Ties into literary themes of sacrifice, mentorship, and moral dilemmas.

📜 3. Whole Class Jury System – The Collective Decision for the True Ending

📜 The True Ending now requires a full-class vote—like a jury system.

✔ Every student must vote on which ending the class will take.
context: From document: RPG Character System (Fully Integrated into Weekly Modules) — chunk 265 (chunk 265/555)
